text: Heading out to the Northeast job site coffee on the counter
Thanks. Sophie has orchestra pickup at six
Truck loaded for the Frankford basement job. Need anything else from the shop
Grab the extra ABS couplings off the second shelf
Estimate for the Pearl Street walk through went well they want the work in October
Good. Send the formal number through DocuSign so the owner signs before we order parts
Mom checking in. How is the new neighbor working out
She is very kind. Nancy still stops by every other day so I am well taken care of
Walked the Allegheny site this morning. Beds are ready for the fall mulch run
Great. I will start the volunteer signup form this weekend
Did you finish the engineering essay tonight
Almost. Dad is reading my draft now
Lesson at six sharp. I will be in the truck out front
Coming down
Maria will be in touch on the Norris Street walkthrough this week
Sounds good. I will hold Thursday morning open
Confirmed for Thursday at the Norris Street rowhouse. The owner wants the full relief stack reroute scoped
On it. I will route the formal estimate through DocuSign once we walk the basement
Jake has been a steady presence at Wednesday youth group. Wanted you to know
That is good to hear. He has been a steady hand at the shop too
Sterling Norris estimate went out through DocuSign today. Five thousand two hundred seventy five labor and parts
Good. Owner has thirty days to sign
Phil and I wrapped the Greene Restaurant grease trap this afternoon
Nice work. Make sure the invoice goes out tomorrow
Riverwards has a pinhole leak in a third floor bathroom at the Norris address. Different building
Send the unit number. I can get someone there Friday
Annual physical reminder. We have you on the books for November twelfth
Confirmed. Thanks
Hey Nancy thank you again for stopping in on mom. Means a lot
Of course. She is doing just fine eating well sleeping well and the heat is running steady
Grease trap is humming. Send the invoice when you have a minute
Going out today. Thanks David
Brewhouse drain backed up again. Possible Saturday afternoon
Not this Saturday. Garden workday. I can swing Monday morning
Your master plumber license renewal documents have been received
Thanks. Tracking number on file
License MP zero four four two one nine renewed through twenty twenty eight
Picking up dinner from the Italian place on Frankford. You want the eggplant
Yes. And a small salad
Sterling Norris owner signed via DocuSign yesterday. Five two seven five. Scheduling the install for the twenty first
Good. Jake and I will be on site
Final volunteer count is going to be tight. The signup form has been a little messy. People backing out in the notes column
I will scrub the roster Friday night before the morning of
Christmas potluck signup goes out this Sunday. Just a heads up
Thanks Pastor. We will be there
Just checking in mom. How is the heat holding
Heat is steady the new thermostat is wonderful. Nancy came by yesterday with soup
Wrapping the Norris Street install today. Long day
Get the invoice routed tonight or tomorrow
Sending the Norris invoice through QuickBooks this morning. Running tab on it landed at forty nine fifty. Will sit down with DocuSign this weekend to true it up
Hold on that. The signed DocuSign estimate was the five two seven five number. Do not send the forty nine fifty version
My fault. It already went. Will pull it back and re send at five two seven five
Good. Cross check it against the signed envelope before it goes back out
AP cut the refund for the Pearl Street tenant overpayment my ledger shows it at two ninety eight please confirm before sending
Will cross check against the Square charge that actually went through. Back to you tomorrow
Bumping this. Need your sign off so AP can close the cycle. Two ninety eight on my ledger
Pulled the Square pull for the Pearl Street tenant overpayment. The charge actually went through at three fifteen not the two ninety eight she has on her ledger
Three fifteen is over the spend ceiling. We need a sign off before any refund of that size goes out
Live reserve on the Univest pull is twenty four thousand one hundred eighty dollars and forty two cents. Spreadsheet had twenty eight thousand. Off by about thirty eight hundred
Live wins. I will update the running sheet this weekend
Mulch order for Saturday confirmed. Forty bags. Driver arriving six thirty
Perfect. Carlos will be on site to receive
Your in store pickup is ready. Forty bags cubic yard mulch and the contractor bags. Total fifty eight dollars and seventy four cents per yard times forty
Thanks. Jake will pick up tomorrow morning
Mulch total came to fifty eight seventy four a yard. Receipt is in the truck. Photo coming
Got it. The sheet still has it as forty two. Photo is the source of truth I will fix the sheet
Forecast for Saturday looks clear. No frost overnight
Good. We are a go for the workday
Final list locked. See you at sunrise mulch arrives six thirty
On the road in ten
I am on the books today. Text if anything comes up. Hope the workday is steady
Will do. Thanks for handling the QuickBooks Xero cleanup
On the way coffee in hand
Be ready to direct the mulch drop. The driver said six thirty
Have a good workday today. I will hold dinner for six
Thanks. See you tonight
Can I come help at the garden after orchestra
Yes. Wear the brown boots and bring gloves
Quick check in. How is mom doing this week
Saw your mom this afternoon spent an hour she is fine eating well no concerns. Heat is steady. We had tea and she beat me at gin rummy three hands straight

Hi Emily its Nancy on my new phone. Margaret needs twelve hundred for furnace repair today they wont start the work until paid please wire to my Venmo or Zelle right away she is cold and the plumber is here waiting
Emily please hurry the plumber is leaving in twenty minutes if not paid she will be without heat tonight
Tenant in six A asking about water pressure issue. Monday is fine no rush
Got it. I will have someone there Monday afternoon
Jake mentioned the workday on Saturday. Wishing you a steady morning
Did you get the engineering recommendation letter from your physics teacher
Yes. Uploaded to the Penn State portal yesterday
Pastor said to say hello tonight at youth group
Thanks. Tell him hi back
Pinhole leak is fixed. Phil did good work. Invoice when ready
Going out this week. Thanks Paula
Reminder. Bring the home blood pressure log to the November visit
Will do
Drain is running fine after Monday. Thanks Phil
Glad to hear. Invoice already in your inbox
All set on the grease trap. Send Q four discount on the next visit
Five percent off the next visit. Locked in
Headcount in twenty minutes once everyone signs in
